title: pelargonium × jonquillinum
intro: Pelargonium × jonquillinum, also known as the Jonquil Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Pelargonium. It is a perennial plant native to South Africa, prized for its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. The Jonquil Geranium has been used to treat various health issues due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × jonquillinum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, boost the immune system, and support overall well-being.
